links.source_location: text: 'For operations with more complex dependency chains, use `better-all` to automatically maximize parallelism (see Dependency-Based Parallelization).'
text: 'This is a specialization of [Defer Await Until Needed](./async-defer-await.md) for `flag && cheapCondition` style checks.'
text: 'We can also create all the promises first, and do `Promise.all()` at the end.'
text: 'Start fetch immediately, but don't await' / const dataPromise = fetchData()
AI-shaped customers often share routes with SaaS/ecommerce surfaces
Storefronts with cart, checkout, product catalogs
Functional Directory Roles section - inferred similar pattern
